name: Funny Volleyball
short_description: "Funny Volleyball" is a modern remake of the classic arcade volleyball game from the 90s, giving new emotions and nostalgia. Immerse yourself in bright and picturesque landscapes, enjoying the game, but do not forget about the main goal - victory!
detailed_description:
"Funny Volleyball" is a modern remake of the classic arcade volleyball game from the 90s, giving new emotions and nostalgia. Immerse yourself in bright and picturesque landscapes, enjoying the game, but do not forget about the main goal - victory! Take part in an exciting arcade tournament or play quick matches. Fight with a smart opponent controlled by the computer, or challenge your friend. Get ready for fun battles and unforgettable moments on the court!

Game Features

  • Character Selection

Each character in the game has unique characteristics that affect the gameplay style. You can choose a character with high stamina, powerful strikes, impressive jump height, or increased movement speed, allowing you to adapt the gameplay to your preferences.

  • Variety of Court Locations

Each tennis court is set in a unique location, adding diversity to the gameplay. You can play on slippery ice, where characters will face difficulties in control, or on a sandy court that slows down running and requires greater agility and strategy from you.

  • Difficulty Levels

The game offers various difficulty levels, allowing every player to find the right challenge. You can face an easy opponent for a casual experience or test your skills against an artificial intelligence that will become a true master of the game, requiring maximum concentration and skill from you to win.

supported_languages:
English*, Bulgarian, Russian
*languages with full audio support
